Maternal, Child & Adolescent Health
Maternal, Child & Adolescent Health
Lake County’s Maternal Child and Adolescent Health (MCAH) Program is dedicated to promoting physical, social, and emotional health and well-being for pregnant persons, children, adolescents, and their families through information, education, and resources. All community members are welcome and valued when they use our services.
The MCAH Program is funded through the federal Title V Maternal & Child Health Services Block Grant. In partnership with the California Department of Public Health and the federal Health Services and Resources Administration, Lake County’s programs are evidenced-based and tailored to meet the unique needs of Lake County.
Programs and Services
California Home Visiting Program
Well Child Visits & Immunization
Community Resources & Health Provider
For questions about programs & services,
please contact Lake County’s MCAH Program at
Health Services
922 Bevins Ct.
Lakeport, CA 95453
707-263-1090
